title: Node
description: Node: A node is one of the core elements in the OpenStreetMap data model. It consists of a single point in space defined by its latitude, longitude and node id.

Latitude.description: The Latitude of the Node, in the range -90.0 to 90.0 with up to 7 decimal places.

Longitude.description: The Longitude of the Node, in the range -180.0 to 180.0 with up to 7 decimal places.

OsmID.description: The unique OpenStreetMap id for the Node.

KeyValues.description: The KeyValue tags describing the geographic attributes of this Node.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
